title: Production Readiness Checklist
concept: Checking: background queues set up, state serialized, cost caps active, tracing enabled, Shadow testing verified.

exercises.prompt: What was the main issue that caused the agents to stall in the last lesson?

options.text: Agents were too slow in processing

exercises.explain: The agents stalled due to a rate limit on a third-party tool, which led to their failures.

cards.title: What is a Production Readiness Checklist?
cards.body: A Production Readiness Checklist is a set of steps to ensure everything is ready for smooth operation in a production environment.

cards.title: Definition of Production Readiness
cards.body: Production readiness means that all systems and processes are set up correctly to run efficiently without issues.

cards.title: Analogy: A Car Before a Long Trip
cards.body: Just like a car needs to be checked for oil, tires, and brakes before a long trip, agents need a checklist to ensure they are ready to work.

cards.title: Production Readiness Checklist Items
cards.body: Important items in the checklist include background queues, state serialization, cost caps, tracing, and shadow testing.

cards.title: Myth: Checklists are Unnecessary
cards.body: Some might think that checklists are unnecessary, but they help catch potential issues before they become problems.

cards.title: Elements of a Production Readiness Checklist
cards.body: Checking each element ensures agents run smoothly and prevent errors.

right.text: Cost caps active, Tracing enabled, Shadow testing verified

exercises.prompt: Which of the following is NOT a part of a Production Readiness Checklist?

options.text: Setting up a new user interface

exercises.explain: Setting up a new user interface is not part of ensuring the readiness of agents for production.

exercises.prompt: True or False: A Production Readiness Checklist is a way to ensure agents can operate without failures.
exercises.explain: True! The checklist is specifically designed to avoid failures by confirming everything is set up properly.

exercises.prompt: Fill in the blank: A good checklist includes checking if _______ is enabled for monitoring agent operations.
exercises.sentence: A good checklist includes checking if tracing is enabled for monitoring agent operations.
exercises.explain: Tracing is essential for monitoring agent operations smoothly.

exercises.prompt: Which of the following is an example of verifying production readiness?

options.text: Ensuring background queues are set up

exercises.explain: Ensuring background queues are set up is critical; it helps manage tasks effectively.

exercises.prompt: Which two items should you check first in a Production Readiness Checklist?
exercises.explain: Background queues and state serialization are foundational for ensuring the agents are properly prepared to handle production tasks.
